payload.label: shelf
payload.long_description: Close-up of a dark stained wooden paneled shelf or cabinet side with a white countertop edge visible along the top; the wood shows a semi-gloss finish and inset vertical rectangular panels, the object is partially cropped at the right edge and appears about 0.5–0.8 m from the camera.
